content: Prints out ChatGPT responses and wants every question-response pair to be stored as part of an iterative record. They want each version to be saved and numbered to track evolution over time. When questions or answers are repeated, the system should recognize this and progress the response to the next iteration, rather than repeating the same output. The goal is to create a full relationship history of prompts and their evolving responses. User wants all threads to include a full printout of both their prompts and ChatGPT's responses, stored as iterations. They prefer this structure so they can trace the evolution of thought and response. They also want the ability to cue moments where ChatGPT prompts them to copy specific data into a “mini-file” for recordkeeping.
